titleStmt.title: SII 9.605: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 605. (A.R. No. 800 of 1917.) ON A BOULDER NEAR THE DESERTED CHANNAKESAVASVAMI TEMPLE AT KONDAPURAM, HINDUPUR TALUK, ANANTAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1465, Śōbhakṛit, Vaiśākha, śu. 15, corresponding to A.D. 1543 April 19, Thursday (not verifiable), in the reign of Sadāśivadēva-Mahārāya. It records that Daḷavāyi Kṛishṇappa-Nāyaka, son of Daḷavāyi Channama-Nāyaka, the Kāryakarta of the king, made a gift of the village, Chernūru, surnamed Channakēśavapura, for the service of the god Channa-Kēśavadēva, with the prayer that the god may be pleased to bestow on Sadāśivadēva-Mahāraya the throne of the Vijayanagara kingdom permanently. The village is stated to have been situated in the Penugoṇḍerājya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svasti śrījayābhyudayaśālivāhanaśakavaruṣaṁbulu 1465 saṁdu
tadupari vartamānake saluva śōbhakrutusaṁvatsarada vaiśākha suddha 15 lu śrīma(ṁ)n
mahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīvīraśrīsadāsivadēvamahārāyaru ratnasiṁhvāsanārūḍharāgi prutivīstirasāṁbrajya geyuta yiralu
pūrva śrīvyāsapratiṣṭhevādanaṁtaradalu janamējayana jīrnnōddhāravāda penugoṁḍeya yaramuṁciya bāgilu śrīcaṁnakēśavadēvarige śrīsādasivadēvamahārāyara kāryyake
karttarāda daḷavāyi caṁnnamanāyakara makkaḷu daḷavāyi kruṣṭapanāyakarū śrīsadāśivadēvamahārāyarige vijayanagarada ratnasiṁhāsanada stirasāṁbrājya pa
ṭavāgabēkeṁdu dēvatāprārthaneya māḍikoṁḍa saṁmaṁdhasvāmi namage naykatanake pāllistapenugoṁḍaya rājyake saluva bīḍu grāmagaḷoḷagaṇa cernūra grāmakke pratināmavāda
śrīca(ṁ)nna kēśavapūraveṁba sarvvamā(ṁ)nyada grāmavanū Adake saluva kīḷuvaḷi Ā catusīmeyoḷagaṇa haḷi paḷi muṁttāda Aṣṭabhōgatējasvamya sayitavāgi
penagoṁḍeya yaramaṁcibāgila śrīca(ṁ)nna kēśavadēvarige daḷavāyi cennanaykara makkaḷū daḷavāyi kruṣṇappanāykarū yī tathātithiyalū śrīsadāśivadēmahā
rāyarige dharmmavāgi sahiraṇyōdakadānadhārapūrvakavāgi dhāreyaneredu koṭa cernura grāmakke pratināmavāda śrīce(ṁ)nna kēśavapuraveṁba sarvamānyada
grāmakke saluva haḷi paḷi kere kūṁṭe kāluve yēnuṁṭāda sakalasvāmyavanu dēvara Amṛtapaḍi muṁtāda sakala vayibhavagaḷanū Ācaṁdrārkkasthayigaḷāgi naḍe
yabēkeṁdu śrīsadāśivadēvamahārāyarige puṇyavāgi daḷavāyi ce(ṁ)nnanāykara makkaḷu daḷavāyi kruṣṇappanāykaru yaramaṁciya bāgila śrīce(ṁ)nnakēśavadēvarige samarpista cernura grāmake
pratināmavāda śrīce(ṁ)nnakēśavapuraveṁba sarvamānyada grāmavu nijabhaktisēvakāpāraṁparivāgi Ācaṁdrārkkāstayi Āgi naḍeyaluḷadū Eṁdū samarppista gramada dānapatraśāsana .
dānapālaneyōrmadhyē dānayēyōnrupālanaṁ dānāt svargamavāpnōti . pālanādacutaṁ padaṁ . svadattādviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ paradattānupālanaṁ paradattāpahārēṇa svadattaṁ niṣphalaṁ bhavēt .
svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā jō harēti vasuṁdharāṁ . svaṣṭirvvaruśasahasrāṇi vriṣṭhayāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ .
Digital edition of SII 9.605 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
